text: My grandparents are on Maple Ave and need medication picked up before tonight. Phones are dying.
Community center has 12 families. We are almost out of baby formula and phone chargers.
Road blocked near Lincoln school entrance. Not sure if anyone is hurt.
Photo from volunteer: tree blocking a two-lane road near a school sign.
Heard the bridge is collapsing near 7th. Not confirmed, friend told me.
I can do supply deliveries for the next 2 hours. I have a van.
Maple Ave seniors still need a pharmacy pickup. One person needs heart meds before evening.
North gym has power strips but no working generator. People asking where they can charge phones.
There is smoke behind Oak Apartments but no visible flames from the front lot.
Two Spanish-speaking families arrived and need updates about evacuation buses.
Can someone check on Mrs. Alvarez at 18 Maple? Her oxygen machine battery is low.
Photo note: small grocery shelf at shelter has water and canned food, no infant formula visible.
Rumor says pets are not allowed at the shelter. Is that true?
East lot entrance is clear. I can direct traffic if needed until 6pm.
Power is out on Pine and 3rd. Traffic lights are dark.
A resident says wires are down near the alley behind Lincoln school. They are sparking.
Shelter desk says we need diapers sizes 2 and 4, wipes, and baby formula by tonight.
Do we know if the evacuation bus is stopping at the library? My neighbor cannot walk far.
Blocked road by Lincoln school again, tree across both lanes, cars turning around.
Charging table is set up in room B, but we only have six cables.
Someone posted that the high school shelter is full. I cannot verify it.
I am a nurse off shift and can help at the community center for one hour.
Man in a blue truck offered to take people through the closed fire road. Sounds unsafe.
Photo description: handwritten sign says 'Room C quiet area' with several older adults resting.
Need blankets in the quiet room. Older adults are cold because heat is off.
Delivery driver reports south entrance has smoke drifting across it. Visibility changes every few minutes.
I found a lost backpack at the shelter desk. Not urgent.
Please send insulin to everyone at Maple, maybe double doses because roads may close.
We confirmed the library bus stop is active until 8pm; needs Spanish announcement.
Family with newborn at community center asks for formula. Same request as earlier but now they have one bottle left.
